text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Today's perfect in terms of feng shui too! And I
even mastered the victory-guaranteed training
plan you prepared for me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've done everything I possibly can to boost my
luck, too, so I should be able to win! ☆
choice_data_list: I know you can do it, Rickey!
I know you can do it, Rickey!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! My luck's skyrocketing thanks to your
support!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, here I go! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Awesome
fortune! ☆
